creator: ward@webware.be
text:
The port www/mod_php5 doesn't exist anymore. The port is used on the web page Apache HTTP server in the freebsd handbook (25.7.5.2.2 mod_php):
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-apache.html

Fix: 

www/mod_php5 is replaced by lang/php5
How-To-Repeat: /
